creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-06-19 00:20:16 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/pecl-spread    Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  pecl-spread is a extension for PHP to support the Spread toolkit API.
  While Spread is an open source toolkit that provides a high performance
  messaging service that is resilient to faults across local and wide area
  networks.
  
  WWW: http://pecl.php.net/package/spread/
  
  PR:             ports/124442
  Submitted by:   Wen Heping <wenheping at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.3107    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +24 -0     ports/devel/pecl-spread/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/devel/pecl-spread/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/devel/pecl-spread/pkg-descr (new)
